description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a dark, corrugated gable roof and a rectangular footprint. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontal wooden planks, giving it a traditional, hand-built appearance. The roof is steeply pitched and features two intersecting gables, providing a classic rural silhouette. There are a few small windows visible, one on the side and another on the front, both framed simply and blending into the wooden facade. The cabin sits on a flat base, with no visible porch or steps leading up to the entrance. The overall look is utilitarian and weathered, suitable for a countryside or forested urban edge.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a dark, steeply pitched gable roof and simple plank walls, featuring small windows and a traditional rural design.
description_view_0: The cabin is seen from a corner angle, highlighting the intersecting gable roof and the shadowed front and side walls.
description_view_1: This view shows the front facade with a small window and the main entrance area, as well as the full width of the gable roof.
description_view_2: The opposite corner reveals another small window on the side and the intersecting gable structure of the roof.
description_view_3: The rear of the cabin is visible, showing the back wall with no windows or doors and the full expanse of the roof.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with intersecting ridges, corrugated texture, steep pitch
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical, two small rectangular windows—one on the front facade and one on the side, spaced apart with no clear pattern
attribute_door_placement: single door on the front facade, slightly offset from center
